Class SimpeWaveFunction1D

Namespace
QuantumWaves
Assembly
QuantumLibrary.dll

Represents a general one dimensional wave function defined by a delegate.

public class SimpeWaveFunction1D : WaveFunction1D

SimpeWaveFunction1D(Func<float, float, ComplexF>, FloatRange, ComplexF)

Initializes a wave function from a given function.

Parameters

wave Func<float, float, ComplexF>

Function defining ψ(x, t).

normalizationConstant ComplexF
